keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY UPPER LIMBS. Upper limbs : Am-m., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Cocc., Fer., Kali-c., Lyc., Merc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, right : Bell., Bism., Bry., Calc-c., Caust., Coloc., Grap., Nat-c., Ran-sc., Sars., Sec-c., Sil., Stro. Upper limbs, left : Anac., Arn., Asaf., Cact., Cimi., Kali-c., Nit-ac., Rhus-t., Sabi., Squil., Stan., Stram., Sul. Upper limbs, alternating between : Aco., Alu., Calc-c., Caust., Cham., Chin., Cocc., Colch., Lac-c., Lyc., Mag-m., Plat., Sep., Zin. Upper limbs, alternating between, upper and lower limbs : Cocc., Fag., Kali-bi., Nat-c., Sil., Val. Upper limbs, shoulder : Aco., Bry., Fer., Kali-c., Kalm., Mag-c., Pul., Rhus-t., Sang. Upper limbs, shoulder, right : Fer., Kalm., Sang., Stro. Upper limbs, shoulder, left : Fer-p., Fer., Led., Mag-c., Nux-m., Sul. Upper limbs, shoulder, left to right : Lyc. Upper limbs, shoulder, alternating : Lyc. Upper limbs, shoulder, heaviness, load, etc. : Anac., Lach., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Stap., Sul. Upper limbs, upper arm : Cocc., Fer., Nat-m. Upper limbs, forearm : Calc-c., Caust., Merc., Rhus-t., Stap. Upper limbs, hands : Calc-c., Caul., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho., Sul. Upper limbs, hands, backs of : Kre., Nat-c., Rhus-t., Sep. Upper limbs, hands, palms : Anac., Grap., Petr., Ran-b., Sele., Spig. Upper limbs, hands, coldness of one : Chin., Dig., Lyc., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Upper limbs, hands, heat, burning, etc. : Agar., Asar., Carb-v., Lach., Mur-ac., Petr., Pho., Sang., Sep., Spig., Stan., Sul. Upper limbs, hands, veins swelled : Am-c., Arn., Ham., Laur., Nux-v., Op., Pho., Pul. Upper limbs, fingers : Am-m., Lyc., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul., Thu. Upper limbs, fingers, between : Grap., Sele. Upper limbs, fingers, clenched thumbs : Hyo., Merc. Upper limbs, fingers, convulsions, spasms of : Agar., Chel., Cup., Sec-c. Upper limbs, fingers, felon, runround, etc. : Anthx., Ap., Ars., Flu-ac., Hep., Lach., Merc., Nat-s., Sil., Sul., Tarn-c., Thu. Upper limbs, fingers, felon, deep : Calc-c., Merc-c., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, nails : Ant-c., Grap., Merc., Sil., Sul., Thu. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, brittle, crumbling, etc. : Clem., Grap., Merc., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, deformed, thickened : Grap., Sep., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, discolored : Grap., Nit-ac. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, hangnails : Calc-c., Nat-m., Nat-s., Rhus-t., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, ingrown : Mag-p-aus., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, nails, painful : Caust., Grap., Merc., Nit-ac., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, around : Calc-p., Kali-bi., Lith-c. Upper limbs, fingers, around, ulceration : Grap., Pul., Sil. Upper limbs, fingers, tips : Am-m., Calc-p., Lach., Mar-v., Pho., Thu. Upper limbs, fingers, tips, cracked : Aur-m., Bar-c., Bell., Cond., Grap., Merc., Petr., Sars., Sil. Upper limbs, fingers, tips, sensitive : Berb., Calc-p., Cist., Lac-c., Nat-c., Sars., Sul. Upper limbs, fingers, tips, sweat on : Carb-an., Carb-v., Sep. Upper limbs, joints : Calc-c., Caust., Kali-c., Led., Lyc., Merc., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Upper limbs, joints, shoulder : Calc-c., Fer-p., Fer., Ign., Kali-c., Nat-m., Pul., Rhus-t., Sang., Sep., Stap., Sul. Upper limbs, joints, elbow : Caust., Kali-c., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Upper limbs, joints, elbow, bend of : Kali-c. Upper limbs, joints, elbow, tip of : Hep. Upper limbs, joints, elbow, herpes : Pho., Sep., Stap., Thu. Upper limbs, joints, wrist : Bov., Calc-c., Caust., Kali-c., Rhus-t., Rut., Sabi., Sep., Sul., Vio-od. Upper limbs, joints, wrist, right : Vio-od. Upper limbs, joints, finger : Ant-c., Calc-c., Calc-f., Caul., Caust., Lyc., Sep., Spig., Sul. Upper limbs, joints, finger, ulcers on : Bor., Mez., Sep. Upper limbs, bones : Asaf., Chin., Cocc., Rhus-t., Sil., Stap. Upper limbs, raising arm , agg., letting it hang, amel. : Aco., Arn., Bar-c., Con., Fer., Led., Rhus-t., Sang., Sil., Sul. Upper limbs, restless : Agar., Caust., Mur-ac., Tarn. Upper limbs, weakness : Anac., Bell., Calc-c., Cic., Kali-c., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
